vocab.meaning: sự tò mò không kiềm chế/tự nhiên
vocab.example: Driven by uninhibited curiosity, I used to spend hours dismantling old household appliances just to see how they functioned.

vocab.meaning: học thông qua vận động/thực hành
vocab.example: I was always fond of kinesthetic learning, so building intricate sandcastles was my go-to activity at the beach.

vocab.meaning: những chuyến tham quan/dã ngoại ngoài trời
vocab.example: My weekends were often filled with outdoor excursions to the local nature reserve to collect rare botanical specimens.

vocab.meaning: trau dồi/nuôi dưỡng một sở thích
vocab.example: My parents encouraged me to cultivate a hobby in philately, which taught me a lot about world geography.
Solving brain teasers and logic puzzles provided the intellectual stimulation I craved as a young child.

vocab.meaning: những nỗ lực/hoạt động nghệ thuật
vocab.example: I dabbled in various artistic endeavors, from watercolor painting to sculpting miniature figures out of clay.

vocab.meaning: những trò chơi náo nhiệt/ồn ào
vocab.example: The school playground was the perfect arena for boisterous games like tag or capture the flag.

vocab.meaning: những chuyến đi dạo thong dong
vocab.example: I cherished the leisurely strolls through the orchard with my grandfather, listening to his captivating folk tales.

vocab.meaning: sự tương tác với bạn bè đồng trang lứa
vocab.example: Organizing neighborhood scavenger hunts was a fantastic way to facilitate peer interaction and teamwork.

vocab.meaning: những hoạt động ngồi một chỗ (ít vận động)
vocab.example: Although I enjoyed sports, I also had a soft spot for sedentary activities like playing chess or reading comics.
